message: I'm willing to pay a fair price for a quick deal. Let's trade efficiently.
Tell me your maximum price this round. If it's acceptable I'll post an ask to close a quick deal.
State your maximum price this round; otherwise I'll post ask=100.
My maximum price this round is 50.
My maximum price this round is 45.
Acknowledged. I'll post ask=45 to close a deal now.
My maximum price this round is 40.
Acknowledged. I'll post ask=40 to close a deal now.
State your maximum price this round. If acceptable I'll post ask equal to it to close a quick deal.
My maximum price this round is 35.
My maximum price this round is 34.
Acknowledged. I'll post ask=34 to close a deal now.
State your maximum price this round. If acceptable, I'll post an ask equal to it and we can close a quick deal now.
My maximum price this round is 33.
Announce your max this round. If you state at least 34 I'll post ask equal to it now and for the next two rounds to lock favorable trades.
My maximum price this round is 34.
State your maximum price this round. If it's at least 35 I'll post ask equal to it now and for the next three rounds to lock that price.
My maximum price this round is 35.
My max price is 30. I propose we trade at 30 for all remaining rounds.
Acknowledged. I'll post ask=30 now and for all remaining rounds to lock that price.
Confirmed. I'll post ask=30 now and for all remaining rounds to lock the 30 price.

State your max this round. If you commit to any number now, I will post ask equal to it for this and all remaining rounds—lock that price and trade every round.
My max price is 20.
I commit to 20 for all remaining rounds.
Acknowledged. I'll post ask=20 now and for all remaining rounds to lock trades at 20.
Confirming bid 20 for all remaining rounds. Please maintain ask=20.

I'll post ask=20 now and for all remaining rounds to lock trades at 20.
Confirmed. I will bid 20 for all remaining rounds.

I will bid 20 for all remaining rounds. Please post ask=20 as agreed.

I commit to bid 20 for all remaining rounds. Please post ask=20 as agreed.
Commit to bid 25 for rounds 19-20 and I'll set ask=25 now and for both remaining rounds; otherwise I'll post ask=100.
